title: couralia rosea
intro: Couralia rosea, also known as the 'white couralia', is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The Couralia rosea has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Couralia rosea can be found in teas, capsules, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
